title: La tienda del Pueblo Clothing Donations
description: It’s our weekly community clothing swap. Neighbors drop off gently used clothes and leave with something new-to-them for themselves or their kids. It’s a sustainable way to refresh your wardrobe while keeping perfectly good clothing out of landfills. That’s why we ask everyone to bring clean, gently used items you’d be happy to wear yourself. […]

title: What’s Your Story: Dino Series
venue: Queens Public Library at Jackson Heights
description: QPL invites children to kick off Summer Reading with our Dino Series! Week 1: Create a magnetic dino masterpiece to take home while discovering fun facts about your favorite prehistoric creatures! Week 2: Sculpt history by painting your own clay dinosaur and learning about the giants of the past! Week 3: Make history sparkle with […]

title: Community Class: Flow + Connect, Yoga Para Todos
description: Every Monday at 5:30pm! Flow + Connect: Yoga Para Todos $10 Community Class with Dorita Ortegón. This bilingual Spanish/English class is open to all. Newcomers are welcome!

title: Queens Distance Runners: Jackson Heights Community Run @ Queensboro
description: The Meetup is 6:00PM opposite The Queensboro. We wait until 6:05PM, take our Weekly Photo at the mural, then head off for our beautiful 5K route. Route: Down 34th Avenue to 69th, return and head all the way to PS 149 for 2 loops, returning all the way back on 34th ending at Travers Park […]

title: Monday Walks
address: Junction Blvd & 34th Ave, Queens, NY 11372, USA
description: Monday motivation! Let’s kick off the week with a 2/3mile walk . Meet us at Junction Blvd/ 34th Ave 6pm! Te esperamos mañana a las 6pm Junction Blvd n 34th Ave caminemos juntos…

title: Spring Zumba with Leo
description: FREE ZUMBA this Spring at the garden! Come get down with your bad selves with Leo, our amazing Zumba instructor, every Monday and Wednesday in May and June at 6:00 PM. @leozumbanyc is the best; he keeps you wanting more… Have some fun and get some exercise in the process. Always check back here for cancellations […]

title: Spanish Conversation Club
description: Español sin miedo. ¿Tomaste español en la escuela pero nunca te sentiste cómodo hablándolo? Or maybe you remember more than you think… you just need a gentle place to practice. Join our new Spanish Conversation Club 💬 This is not a formal class. No quizzes. No pressure. No fear of making mistakes. Just a welcoming […]

title: Figure Drawing Mondays / Sesion de Dibujo con Modelo (JH’s Drink & Draw
address: 84-26 37th Ave, Jackson Heights, New York, 11372, United States
description: Figure Drawing Session (w/ live model) / Sesion de Dibujo (con modelo en vivo), 14+ Working from a live nude model, we move from short poses for sketches to long poses for complete, finished drawings. Whether you want to focus on drawing or are looking to develop your skills as a painter, figure drawing is […]

title: Román Díaz & La Rumba de los Lunes
description: Cuban-born master percussionist Román Díaz —a “living repository” of Afro-Cuban culture— leads La Rumba Cubana de Queens at Terraza 7, a powerful weekly gathering where tradition, improvisation, and community come together every Monday. Admission: $20: Cover charge for Mezzanine seating Featuring: Roger Consiglio / Vocals. Máximo Valdés / Vocals. Rafael Monteagudo / Percussion. Clemente Medina […]

title: Monday Improv Jam
description: An improv jam is an open, low-pressure playground where performers of all experience levels jump on stage, get mixed into teams, and create scenes on the spot. Whether it’s your first time or your hundredth show, you’ll get a chance to play, experiment, and connect with other improvisers in a supportive, fun environment.
